pi_items.source: task.json description field (line 5) and setup_task.sh terminal output (line 30)
export_result.sh line 13 and MSH.9 field in test message (line 18)
HL7 test message PID segment field 3, component 1 (PID.3.1). Parsed from PID|1||12345^^^MRN||Doe^John
HL7 test message PID segment field 5, constructed as PID.5.1 + space + PID.5.2. From 'Doe^John' becomes 'Doe John'. Task description line 5 specifies this extraction logic.

HL7 test message EVN segment field 2 (EVN.2) contains timestamp 20230101120000 (YYYYMMDDHHMMSS format). Converted to ISO 8601 format per task requirements (line 5: 'convert format to YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS'). Conversion verified: 20230101120000 -> 2023-01-01T12:00:00

privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic test data. The test message is a complete HL7 v2.3 ADT^A01 message with the following verified properties: Message ID 'VERIFY001' (MSH.9), Patient ID '12345' extracted from PID.3.1, Patient Name 'Doe John' constructed from PID.5.1 and PID.5.2 (Doe^John), and Event Date/Time '2023-01-01T12:00:00' converted from HL7 timestamp format '20230101120000' (YYYYMMDDHHMMSS) to ISO 8601 format. The channel should listen on port 6661, write HL7 files to /home/ga/archive_drop/ as 'adt-{MESSAGEID}.hl7', and XML manifests as 'adt-{MESSAGEID}.xml' with the extracted metadata in <IndexEntry> format.
